original_query: select     substring(w_warehouse_name,1,20)   ,sm_type   ,cc_name   ,sum(case when (cs_ship_date_sk - cs_sold_date_sk <= 30 ) then 1 else 0 end)  as "30 days"   ,sum(case when (cs_ship_date_sk - cs_sold_date_sk > 30) and                  (cs_ship_date_sk - cs_sold_date_sk <= 60) then 1 else 0 end )  as "31-60 days"   ,sum(case when (cs_ship_date_sk - cs_sold_date_sk > 60) and                  (cs_ship_date_sk - cs_sold_date_sk <= 90) then 1 else 0 end)  as "61-90 days"   ,sum(case when (cs_ship_date_sk - cs_sold_date_sk > 90) and                  (cs_ship_date_sk - cs_sold_date_sk <= 120) then 1 else 0 end)  as "91-120 days"   ,sum(case when (cs_ship_date_sk - cs_sold_date_sk  > 120) then 1 else 0 end)  as ">120 days" from    catalog_sales   ,warehouse   ,ship_mode   ,call_center   ,date_dim where d_month_seq between 1189 and 1189 + 23 and cs_ship_date_sk   = d_date_sk and cs_warehouse_sk   = w_warehouse_sk and cs_ship_mode_sk   = sm_ship_mode_sk and cs_call_center_sk = cc_call_center_sk and cs_list_price between 94 and 123 and sm_type = 'REGULAR' and cc_class = 'medium' and w_gmt_offset = -5 group by    substring(w_warehouse_name,1,20)   ,sm_type   ,cc_name order by substring(w_warehouse_name,1,20)         ,sm_type         ,cc_name limit 100;
rewritten_query:
SELECT 
    SUBSTRING(w_warehouse_name, 1, 20) AS warehouse_short,
    sm_type,
    cc_name,
    SUM(CASE WHEN (cs_ship_date_sk - cs_sold_date_sk) <= 30 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS "30 days",
    SUM(CASE WHEN (cs_ship_date_sk - cs_sold_date_sk) BETWEEN 31 AND 60 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS "31-60 days",
    SUM(CASE WHEN (cs_ship_date_sk - cs_sold_date_sk) BETWEEN 61 AND 90 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS "61-90 days",
    SUM(CASE WHEN (cs_ship_date_sk - cs_sold_date_sk) BETWEEN 91 AND 120 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS "91-120 days",
    SUM(CASE WHEN (cs_ship_date_sk - cs_sold_date_sk) > 120 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS ">120 days"
FROM catalog_sales
JOIN warehouse 
    ON catalog_sales.cs_warehouse_sk = warehouse.w_warehouse_sk
    AND warehouse.w_gmt_offset = -5
JOIN ship_mode 
    ON catalog_sales.cs_ship_mode_sk = ship_mode.sm_ship_mode_sk
    AND ship_mode.sm_type = 'REGULAR'
JOIN call_center 
    ON catalog_sales.cs_call_center_sk = call_center.cc_call_center_sk
    AND call_center.cc_class = 'medium'
JOIN date_dim 
    ON catalog_sales.cs_ship_date_sk = date_dim.d_date_sk
    AND date_dim.d_month_seq BETWEEN 1189 AND 1189 + 23
WHERE catalog_sales.cs_list_price BETWEEN 94 AND 123
GROUP BY 
    SUBSTRING(w_warehouse_name, 1, 20),
    sm_type,
    cc_name
ORDER BY 
    warehouse_short,
    sm_type,
    cc_name
LIMIT 100;

rewrite_suggestion.nave_suggestion: Converted implicit joins (comma-separated tables with WHERE conditions) to explicit JOIN syntax for better readability and potential query optimization.
Moved filtering conditions from the WHERE clause to the JOIN ON clauses to allow earlier filtering during join operations.
Simplified range conditions in CASE expressions by using BETWEEN operator instead of separate comparisons.
